title: epilobium numidicum
intro: Epilobium numidicum, also known as Numidian willowherb, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of salicylic acid and other phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Epilobium numidicum include its potential to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its ability to help regulate the menstrual cycle and alleviate symptoms of menopause. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support women's health and well-being.
